RiskMatrix.Recommendation: Immediately restrict trust policy: add ExternalId condition, replace AdministratorAccess with ReadOnlyAccess, reduce session duration.

Findings: AdministratorAccess attached to Lambda execution role
RiskMatrix.Recommendation: Replace AdministratorAccess with a custom policy scoped to Lambda's actual resource needs.

Findings: Account marked for decommission but still active
RiskMatrix.Recommendation: Disable access keys immediately. Delete user after confirming no active dependencies.
Disable access keys and delete user. Temporary accounts should have auto-expiry.

Findings: Two active access keys (should use one + rotate)
RiskMatrix.Recommendation: Rotate access keys. Implement automated key rotation schedule (90-day max).

Findings: Wildcard actions on ecs:*, vpc:*, slb:*
ram:CreateRole on * — allows trust relationship creation
RiskMatrix.Recommendation: Remove ram:PassRole and ram:CreateRole. Scope actions to specific resources.
